curation_notes: Patch commit 121870a identified from advisory references. Two non-test source files changed: remote-fs-bridge.ts (readFile method refactored to use runMutation) and fs-bridge-mutation-helper.ts (new read_file function added using fd-based operations). The vulnerability is in readFile which performed resolveCanonicalPath and assertNoHardlinkedFile as separate shell commands before reading with cat, creating a TOCTOU race window. The fix routes reads through the mutation helper which uses os.open with dir_fd for atomic open-and-read. No sibling files share this pattern: the local fs-bridge.ts already uses fd-based readFileSync, and other methods in remote-fs-bridge.ts already used runMutation. Vulnerability class race-condition confirmed from CWE-367 (TOCTOU) and the patch clearly replacing check-then-use with atomic fd-based operations.
